assertions.text: The vehicle was traveling just under 80 km/h on the highway before braking began.
The driver had been easing off the throttle / decelerating gradually for a few seconds before the collision as traffic ahead slowed.
There were two distinct impacts/jolts felt about one second apart.
Within two to three seconds after the collision the vehicle's speed reduced from motorway pace to a crawl.
The collision reduced the vehicle's speed dramatically from near 80 km/h to a crawl, implying a significant speed change.
The collision occurred on a highway/motorway while traffic ahead was slowing.

verdicts.evidence: The GPS shows an initial speed of [79.0 km/h](T2) at t=0.0 s, which matches "just under 80 km/h".

Detect_events shows a sustained deceleration on accel_x from [8.15 s to 9.92 s](T3) with mean magnitude [0.89 g](T3), indicating easing off/throttle reduction for a few seconds before the impact at ~9.2–10.17 s.

Two distinct impact spikes are detected on accel_x at [9.19 s](T3) and [10.17 s](T3) with magnitudes [4.7 g](T3) and [5.75 g](T3) respectively, about [0.98 s] apart (difference between [10.17 s] and [9.19 s] from T3).
The sustained deceleration interval on accel_x from [8.15 s to 9.92 s](T3) begins before the first detected impact at [9.19 s](T3), indicating braking/decelerating occurred before the collision.

GPS speed drops from [70.0 km/h at 8.0 s] to [43.0 km/h at 11.0 s] per detect_events (T3), i.e. a reduction into the ~40 km/h range within about [3.0 s] (from 8.0 s to 11.0 s). Additionally compute_stats showsgps last values falling to [12.0 km/h at 16.0 s](T2).

The GPS shows a speed change of [67.0 km/h](T2) from the first to last sample (79.0 to 12.0 km/h) and detect_events records a [27.0 km/h] drop between [8.0 s and 11.0 s] (T3), supporting a dramatic speed reduction from near [79.0 km/h](T2) to low speed.

The telemetry confirms highway-like initial speed ([79.0 km/h](T2)) but contains no road-type or traffic-ahead annotations, so whether it occurred on a highway while traffic ahead was slowing is [unverifiable] (T1).

result.rationale: Telemetry shows an initial GPS speed of [79.0 km/h](T2), a sustained deceleration period from [8.15 s to 9.92 s](T3), two impact spikes at [9.19 s](T3) and [10.17 s](T3), and a GPS speed drop from [70.0 km/h to 43.0 km/h between 8.0 s and 11.0 s](T3), supporting the narrative's main assertions about speed, pre-impact braking, impact count and post-impact speed reduction.

result.notes: 100 Hz IMU over a 16 s window. Units: accel g, gyro deg/s, speed km/h. Device-to-vehicle axis alignment is NOT documented; do not assume which axis is longitudinal without cross-checking against GPS speed.

accel_x.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

accel_y.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

accel_z.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

detections.note: direction ambiguous: device axis orientation undocumented
rollover-suspect if on a roll/pitch axis; axis frame undocumented

result.thresholds_doc: impact spike: |a-baseline|>2.5g (>=20ms, merged<0.25s); sustained: 0.5s-avg in 0.35-1.2g; rotation: >40.0deg/s for 0.3s; net rotation >60.0deg; speed drop: >=15.0km/h in <=3.0s; brake: 0->1 transitions; CISS impact: max |crash-pulse delta-V|
